_doc: ASUS, Lenovo, MSI, AYANEO, GPD, and One-Netbook do not break out handheld unit sales. Figures here come from IDC / Circana / DFC reports cited by trade press. Most entries are placeholders until credible public numbers land.

source.description: Best-effort analyst estimates for non-Valve PC handhelds.

facts.note: ~1M is the most commonly cited 2024 estimate for original ROG Ally. ASUS has not confirmed.
